title: Tim Holtz Idea-ology Glass Apothecary Vials with Corks 7/Vial Pack, Includes 20 Vintage Labels and 7 Corks, Tinted Glass (TH93302) , Brown
description:
About this item
Package Includes: 7 tinted glass vials, 7 corks, and 1 sheet of 20 vintage-style vial stickers
Apothecary mini glass vials range in size from 1-3/8 to 1-5/8 inches tall.
Tinted glass bottles arrive in 2 colors: smoky beige and copper
Sold Separately Tim Holtz Idea-ology 9-pack of clear glass corked vials ( TH92899).
Manufactured by Advantus
reviews_5s:
Super cute, especially with the labels. They are just smaller than I expected. My fault though. I didn’t check the sizeI bought these with the purpose of using them for my Halloween decor. I love that these came with labels.I love this product Tim Holtz an ideology always has fantastic products you can never go wrongTim Holtz and Idea-ology products are my favorites for multimedia art and crafting in general. Theses little bottles are perfection and I've used them time and again.A friend wanted them so I sent them to her. She was very happy.Nice for an accent to decorGreat product to use in multi media projectsUsed for Plague Doctor halloween costume.
Looked great!!Perfect size for wish bottles and so cute.Lovely items. My teen with fluctuating styles nature, goth, Wican loves it! Score!...
reviews_1s:
Very small not work the money. Don't purchase if you are using as Halloween you can't hardly see them they are so small. Was very disappointed.Severely overpriced for what it is
A couple of tiny bottles you can pick up cheap from craft places for £6. Not again.
